title: Juice-PlayerVaults
body:
A simple and powerful vault system for Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric).
PlayerVaults let players access extra storage from anywhere with ease — perfect for all Minecraft Servers!
⚙️ Features

- /pv → Instantly open a personal double chest from thin air.

- Supports 1 – 1,000,000 vaults (configurable via permissions).

- Store items on the go — no need to return to base!

🛡️ Permissions (LuckPerms Supported)

- playervaults.pv.1 → Grants access to vault #1 (scales up as needed, e.g. .pv.5, .pv.100, etc.).

- playervaults.pv.* → Grants access to all vaults.

- playervaults.export → /pv export <player> <#> → Exports a vault’s contents to a JSON file.

- playervaults.viewothers → Allows staff to view other players’ vaults in read-only mode.

- playervaults.editothers → Allows staff to open and edit other players’ vaults.

✅ Why Use This?

- Fast and lightweight

- Infinite scalability (up to 1M vaults(Will take up space on server))

- Perfect for staff moderation & player convenience

- Fully integrated with LuckPerms

Simple. Easy. Reliable storage anywhere.
